title: SpecX Execution Spec
purpose: Define the SpecX compile chain used during harness build.
stageRules: Contract source must include harness, agent, runtimeBinding, outputContract, validation, and backtest sections.
Contract reasoning must be explicit and must fail closed when required governance fields are missing.
Compiled contracts must reject unknown fields and invalid ordering.
Three-layer specs must be derived from the compiled contract and linked through compiledFrom.
